project_type: Monorepo with 16 apps, 8 services, 88 shared packages
verification_instructions: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build must stay green. After this phase, a smoke test must prove a DB-backed request succeeds and a protected route 401s without a JWT / 200s with a valid one.
snapshot_or_generated_files: Prisma client is generated into node_modules/.prisma/client (see packages/database). Run prisma generate before typecheck.
setup_instructions: pnpm install (done). For DB-touching verification: pnpm dev:infra (docker compose -f docker-compose.dev.yml up -d) brings up postgres/redis.
environment_constraints: No @ts-ignore / @ts-expect-error. Do NOT lower coverage thresholds. App backends are standalone Fastify servers built on @quant/server-core's createApp().
key_patterns: createApp() in packages/server-core/src/app.ts builds the Fastify instance (helmet, cors, rate-limit, cookies, error-handler, request-id, metrics, auth, health plugins). App backends call createApp() then app.register() per route module (e.g. apps/quantmail/backend/app.ts). Route handlers currently read `const prisma = (fastify as unknown as { prisma: PrismaClient }).prisma` and `request.auth?.userId`. The Prisma singleton is exported from @quant/database (packages/database/src/client.ts). The auth plugin defines fastify.requireAuth() in packages/server-core/src/plugins/auth.ts (jose jwtVerify, sets request.auth).
directory_structure: Each Next.js app (quantmail, quantchat, quantai, quantcalendar, quantdocs, quantdrive, quantmeet) has src/app/api/** proxy routes (read *_BACKEND_URL) and a backend/ Fastify server (app.ts + routes/ + services/). Shared server framework is @quant/server-core. DB is @quant/database (Prisma, postgres). service-discovery (packages/service-discovery) holds a service-name->port registry.
